name: German Chocolate Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Partially melt the chocolate over hot water. Remove from heat and stir until melted.
2. Let the chocolate cool completely.
3. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar and shortening until light and fluffy.
4. Add the eggs, one at a time, to the sugar mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in the vanilla, butter flavoring, and buttermilk until combined.
6. Sift together the cake flour, baking soda, and salt.
7. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
8. Fold in the melted chocolate until evenly distributed.
9. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9-inch tube pan.
10. Bake at 300°F (150°C) for about 1 1/2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Remove from the pan while still hot and place in a tightly covered container to cool thoroughly before slicing.
